item.description: irishracing.com @irishracing · 12min Eustace banks on fresh approach to unlock Docklands in FWD Champions Mile irishracing.com Eustace banks on fresh approach to unlock Docklands in FWD Champions Mile Harry Eustace believes a different preparation can unlock an improved performance from Docklands in the HK$24 million G1 FWD Champions Mile. 181

item.description:
Racing TV @RacingTV · 22min "She’s likely to be under the radar wherever she appears next and needs one more run for a handicap mark."
